ideation: This sequence simulates the act of launching a plane, using both arms to mimic the motion of propelling something forward. The arms will move in a coordinated manner, starting with a preparatory pose and ending with a forceful push.  I'll ensure smooth transitions and refer to previous examples to create natural arm movements. Frame 1 shows both arms slightly bent and positioned as if preparing for a push. Frame 2 shows a pushing motion, with the arms extending and moving downward. Frame 3 shows the arms recovering to a slightly more relaxed position, simulating the release after the launch. Frame 4 shows the arms returning to a neutral, resting position.

frames.beat: arms pull back, preparing for launch
both arms thrust forward and down, propelling the plane
arms release and begin to rise slightly
arms settle back to a resting position
